channel.title: Workload Identity on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Workload Identity on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Red Hat OpenShift Managed Identity and Workload Identity
item.description:
Azure Red Hat OpenShift now generally supports managed identities and workload identities. This lets clusters and applications run on Azure without long-lived service principal credentials.

  • Source: Azure Updates
